query:
UPDATE games SET
  -- Model scores
  modelAwayScore = 3.80,
  modelHomeScore = 4.53,
  -- Model moneyline (no-vig, rounded to whole numbers)
  modelAwayML = '+140',
  modelHomeML = '-140',
  -- Model win probabilities
  modelAwayWinPct = 41.72,
  modelHomeWinPct = 58.28,
  -- Model spread odds (home is favored: MIL -1.5)
  -- awayBookSpread = +1.5 (CWS), homeBookSpread = -1.5 (MIL)
  -- Engine: away RL (CWS +1.5) odds = -140, home RL (MIL -1.5) odds = +140
  modelAwaySpreadOdds = '-140',
  modelHomeSpreadOdds = '+140',
  -- Run line
  awayRunLine = '+1.5',
  homeRunLine = '-1.5',
  awayRunLineOdds = '-140',
  homeRunLineOdds = '+140',
  -- Model total
  modelTotal = 8.0,
  modelOverRate = 43.90,
  modelUnderRate = 45.80,
  -- Model over/under odds
  modelOverOdds = '+128',
  modelUnderOdds = '+118',
  -- Edge fields (away_ml edge +3.11pp, away_rl edge +5.96pp)
  spreadEdge = 'CWS +1.5',
  spreadDiff = 5.96,
  totalEdge = 'NO EDGE',
  totalDiff = 0.0,
  -- Published
  publishedModel = 1,
  modelRunAt = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
WHERE id = 2250008;

  -- Model win probabilities

  -- Model spread odds (home is favored: MIL -1.5)
  -- awayBookSpread = +1.5 (CWS), homeBookSpread = -1.5 (MIL)
  -- Engine: away RL (CWS +1.5) odds = -140, home RL (MIL -1.5) odds = +140
  modelAwaySpreadOdds = '-140',
  modelHomeSpreadOdds = '+140',
  -- Run line
  awayRunLine = '+1.5',
  homeRunLine = '-1.5',
  awayRunLineOdds = '-140',
  homeRunLineOdds = '+140',
  -- Model total
  modelTotal = 8.0,
  modelOverRate = 43.90,
  modelUnderRate = 45.80,
  -- Model over/under odds
  modelOverOdds = '+128',
  modelUnderOdds = '+118',
  -- Edge fields (away_ml edge +3.11pp, away_rl edge +5.96pp)
  spreadEdge = 'CWS +1.5',
  spreadDiff = 5.96,
  totalEdge = 'NO EDGE',
  totalDiff = 0.0,
  -- Published
  publishedModel = 1,
  modelRunAt = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
WHERE id = 2250008;
